{{Quote|Touch me again, ''chakaar'', and I'll ram this into your carotid artery.|Serku unwittingly angers [[Mirta Gev]]|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice">''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''</ref>}}
'''Serku''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Hamadryas]] who served as a [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] for the criminal [[L. Fraig]] while living in [[Kuat City]].
He accidentally touched [[Mirta Gev]]'s back too low, causing Mirta to threaten him.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
